selecting.title: Send files
selecting.description: Choose one or more files and generate a one-time code for a direct encrypted transfer.

preparing.title: Preparing transfer
preparing.description: Preparing the selected files before the share code is revealed.

waiting_for_receiver.title: Share the code
waiting_for_receiver.description: Send the code or QR to your recipient to start the transfer.

receiver_connected.title: Share the code
receiver_connected.description: Send the code or QR to your recipient to start the transfer.
